prompt: I just modified src/index.php — sync it. DRY RUN, print CMD: lines.

assertions.name: issues_scp_upload_for_index_php
assertions.text: Response contains a CMD line with scp uploading src/index.php to /var/www/html/src/index.php

assertions.name: creates_remote_dir
assertions.text: Includes ssh mkdir -p for /var/www/html/src before scp

assertions.name: summary_mentions_upload
assertions.text: Summary clearly states index.php was uploaded (not just planned)
